hook: ChatGPT keeps explaining things to me like I'm 12. I have a PhD.
caption:
ChatGPT keeps explaining things to me like I'm 12. I have a PhD.

Not a humble brag. A genuine problem.

I ask about mitochondrial protein folding and I get: "Great question! Think of proteins like tiny machines inside your cells..."

I KNOW WHAT CELLS ARE.

The issue isn't the AI. The issue is the AI has no idea who it's talking to. Every conversation starts from zero. Every single time.

It doesn't know you're an expert who wants peer-level conversation, not a TED Talk.

It doesn't know you hate bullet points and want dense paragraphs.

It doesn't know you'd rather get a sharp wrong answer than a hedged non-answer.

So it defaults to... the middle. Safe. Beige. Condescending.

This is the problem bootfile.ai was built to fix.

Your BootFile is a profile that captures exactly how you think — your expertise level, your communication style, your tolerance for nuance, your blind spots, your preferences.

You paste it at the start of any conversation and the AI actually knows who it's talking to.

No more explaining what a cell is.

Link in bio to build yours (takes about 8 minutes).
